hotel_name: Khách Sạn & Spa Aurora Riverside Hội An (Hoi An Aurora Riverside Hotel & Spa)

reviews.title: Stay away
reviews.text: Stay away

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nothing

reviews.title: It not standard for 4 * hotel
reviews.text: Never come back

reviews.title: Nice place, decent but not amazing
reviews.positives: Nice pool
reviews.negatives:
The staff didn’t speak decent English and it felt like they were looking to charge us for additional services 
The check in desk only opened at 6 am

reviews.title: Mislead on bookings
reviews.text: Made bookings online with Agoda for Superior Twin.  When we arrived, we were told the bookings does not come with any amenities.  No bed sheets, no towels etc..  Everything has to be purchased.  This is unheard off.  After 2 hours wait with Agoda, we were told the booking we made has full amenities.  Agoda tried arguing with them and they insisted that the room does not come with any amenities.  So, finally Agoda initiated to compensate us for the additional charges.  Outrageous!   Location is too far from the old quarters. Everything about their listing is not true.  The only good thing came out of our experience here was the staff.  Not recommended and becareful.

reviews.title: Great value with terrific staff
reviews.positives: This is a nice hotel with very polite and happy staff. Our room was spacious and very clean.  It’s a fair way from the centre of Hoi An which suited us as we had a Grab account and getting transport was super easy. The location is much quieter than downtown Hoi A which is noisy with lots of traffic. The hotel is more of place to crash than a holiday resort and theres not a lot in terms of shops and restaurants etc close by, I’d stay here again -it’s great value and closer the beach.

reviews.title: BAD EXPERIENCES
reviews.text: This hotel is not 4 stars. Its 3 stars. Staffs were unfriendly. The location was so far away from the center. Not gonna come back
reviews.positives: Room was clean. The pool was beautiful but small! The view was terrible back there

reviews.title: Comfortable, relaxing hotel on the riverside
reviews.positives: The hotel is very comfortable and located in a great area away from the busiest part of the city center but still close to restaurants and attractions. The staff are friendly and helpful, and it's convenient to have a cafe, pool, and spa onsite. However, if you’re on a low floor, it can be very loud at night.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: If you are looking for a place near old towne this is not it.  We were promised a shuttle only to arrive to discover shuttle only runs on weekends. Also, the hotel is right beside a cemetary.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
We loved been away from central/busy hoi an

The staff were so helpful and friendly

reviews.title: Overpriced and Staff Doesn't Speak English
reviews.text:
I stayed here and tried to instant transfer them 1.8 million VND to exchange to USD but then they kept my money and said it would take 15 days to refund.

Everywhere else instantly received my money.

Don't trust this place at all.

1.6 million VND for mediocre massage and woman took forever to setup.

Don't recommend!

reviews.title: One of the best hotel in Hoian. Highly recommended!
reviews.positives: The staff were very accommodating and exceptional! They were very helpful and made our joy very worth while. It’s also a great location as a base to explore Hoi An!
reviews.negatives: The staff were very accommodating and exceptional! They were very helpful and made our joy very worth while. It’s also a great location as a base to explore Hoi An!

reviews.title: The Management put me in the. Last Room The. Balcony facing Padi field AND ALSO. A CHINESE. CENTER CEMETERY 😫
reviews.text: The breakfast manu is good. With Western and Eastern combine

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: very good

reviews.title: Average hotel
reviews.text: Near to the Hoi An Town center
reviews.positives: location, room big, quite

reviews.title: Lovely
reviews.positives: Clean and lovely place. Friendly and helpful staffs. Can use their bicycle to go around. Beautiful riverside. Definitely will recommend this hotel. I had a great time here during the lunar new year.

reviews.title: Hoi An Aurora Riverside Hotel & Spa
reviews.text: The rooms are alright and clean but the beddings were not changed.  I am always traveling so I would know if the beddings were changed.  Though, I requested that they change it all and they did it.  Also, since there are very few guests, the breakfast buffet becomes ala carte but we paid for a buffet.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La chambre était confortable et la localisation excentrée mais avec tous les services à proximité. La première chambre avait une forte odeur de moisie mais ils nous ont changé de chambre sans insister. J’ai rencontré un souci avec le service de laundry mais l’établissement a su proposer une solution plutôt convenable.
reviews.negatives: Le ménage était moyen au niveau de la salle de bain notamment. À proximité de la piscine nous avions les nuisances qui allaient avec, notamment du fait que tous les voyageurs n’accordent pas tous le même respect (les enfants qui crient dès 8h…)

reviews.title: Not what it claims to be.
reviews.text:
Pictures are probably from new. The entrance is well kept but as you pass thru you can see the difference. Daily housecleaning is quick and not done well. Stayed 3 nights in a Twin room and bathroom was never cleaned or bathmat replaced.  Free bikes are old and you better be in shape to peddle. 
The only pro is the breakfast offered. Nicely laid out with many choices. 
Would we return, no. There are many more places in Hoi An to choose from.

reviews.title: Super séjour
reviews.positives:
L'accueil et la gentillesse du personnel toujours prêt à rendre service. 
Grande chambre confortable et belle piscine.

reviews.title: No early check in
reviews.text: No early check in

reviews.title: Établissement sympathique
reviews.positives: Le personnel prévenant et souriant.
reviews.negatives: La chambre était un peu bruyante car elle donnait sur la rue

reviews.title: Kids playing in the pool from 7am
reviews.text:
A lot of kids playing in the swimming pool during my stay. Most of the residents should have heard them as well as my friends were forced to wake up early. If you want more sleep I would recommend you to choose other places.
Excellent river view from the hotel. Nice staff and fairly good buffet breakfast.

reviews.title: Séjour très agréable
reviews.positives: Accueil chaleureux équipements disponibilité du personnel emplacement

reviews.title: 3 stars
reviews.text: Clean. Comfortable.

reviews.title: Un très bon choix pour un budget maîtrisé
reviews.positives: Prix très compétitif pour cet hôtel bien situé. Bon Petit déjeuner avec beaucoup de choix. Piscine sympathique. Un très bon choix dans cette gamme de prix

reviews.title: Reminds me of Mexico
reviews.text:
Another hotel that treats guests like a number. 
Needed to change rooms as our first one had mold on the walls and linens and our bed sheets were damp. 
The staff didn't understand what mold was but allowed us to change the rooms anyways.
We were satisfied with the second room. 
Nice pool

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Vraiment parfait comme d’habitude !

reviews.title: Overrated
reviews.text: This hotel is far from Hoi An ancient town and the beach. The hotel provides shuttle service to Hoi An. However, the hours are limited. The river view that the hotel offers is somewhat scenic and tranquil. My room was OK. It doesn't have the quality that I expect from a 4-star hotel.
reviews.positives: staff, bike rental, bar

reviews.title: Viel zu teuer und kaputte Fahrrädern
reviews.positives: Grosses Zimmer

reviews.title: disappointed
reviews.text: We moved after one day as the construction by the pool was so loud you couldn't even have a conversation with anyone. The hotel manager moved us to another hotel free of charge and was very apologetic. I would go back and stay here once the construction (which is due to finish in Nov 15) as it appeared to be a lovely hotel.
reviews.positives: the hotel manager was amazing. I left my bag in the taxi and he was straight on the phone tracking it down. all staff were incredibly accommodating.

reviews.title: Freundlich, sauber, bequeme Betten
reviews.positives: Freundliches Personal, geräumiges Zimmer, bequemes Bett, schöner Pool. Wäscheservice tiptop und schnell. Das Frühstück ist ok, die Lage zwischen Strand und Stadt. Bei gutem Wetter toll, um mit dem Fahrrad zu beidem zu gelangen, bei schlechtem Wetter haben wir meistens ein Grab bestellt, da es zu Fuss doch ca. 40 Minuten in die Stadt sind.

reviews.title: Richard Kyffin
reviews.text: Value for money exceptional service, very welcoming and the breakfasts are wholesome. The staff are always willing to help. Management converses freely and openly. I highly recomend the hotel

reviews.title: Aurora - der Platz zum Entschleunigen
reviews.positives: Perfekte Lage zwischen Altstadt und Strand - familiäres Personal - Ausstattung sehr gut

reviews.title: Could improve
reviews.text: I paid for two garden view rooms and they tried to send us upstairs for cheaper rooms. The front desk staff was not professional. One of the rooms had flies. Other than that it was a pleasant stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Mooie ruime kamer met een proper zwembad om even af te koelen van het warme weer hier.

reviews.title: Food is bad and unerthusiasm receptionists

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng
reviews.negatives: Phòng mới check in vào bị bẩn duvet . Có côn trùng chết . Nhân viên lên thay duvet thì nói chuyện cá nhân qua điện thoại khá lâu

reviews.title: Overrated
reviews.text:
Positives - service of staff is excellent and room size was much bigger than I expected.

Negatives - Walls are too thin & I could hear everything going on in the room beside. Dead insects everywhere in the room and toilet. Random pipe (not sure exactly what it was actually) wailing noise that lasts for quite some time even at night. Roosters crowing (pretty loudly) in the early morning at 5 plus am. Rice padi field view is a tad misleading as it's also a cemetery (yes, cemetery) view, and I was disappointed that I was not told about this in advance. Sticky floors (I am not sure what it was that was sprayed on the floors, but it sure was uncomfortable). No sheltered walkway from rooms to dining area.
reviews.positives: Hotel staff, room size and distance to the beach

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Vị trị tiện
reviews.negatives: Xe phảii đưa ck cho bảo vệ

reviews.title: Everything was quite good until the employee handed me a torn and tattered towel.
reviews.text: The hotel is located away from the city center, and you will need to travel about 3-5 km to reach the main entertainment area or go to An Bang beach. The rooms are spacious, beautifully clean, with regular bathroom fixtures, and there is a swimming pool suitable for families with small children. The billiard table needs to be rearranged for use because it is currently tilted. When I changed my towel because the original one was wet, the hotel staff gave me a towel that was so torn it was unbelievable that they would still offer it to guests. I reported this directly to the front desk on the first floor and was not satisfied at all.

reviews.title: Bình thường
reviews.positives: Tạm ổn
reviews.negatives: Không như trong hình. khách sạn khá nhỏ

reviews.negatives: dãy phòng nằm cạnh đường lớn nên hơi ồn!

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.text: We had a pleasant week at the Aurora Riverside. The location was away from the hustle and bustle but was close enough for a bike ride. Rooms were clean and we appreciated the daily room cleans even when we slept in. On the day we checked out, breakfast packs were supplied and the shuttle to Da Nang airport was cheaper than by taxi. We would definitely stay here again on our next visit.
reviews.positives: Staff were very friendly and helpful. Management surprised me with a cake and cocktails on my birthday. Quite close to the beach by bike.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nhân viên rất nhiệt tình,dễ thương, đặc biệt là chú bảo vệ!
reviews.negatives: 1 điểm trừ nhỏ là TV chưa đc trang bị internet

reviews.title: Overall value matches the price
reviews.text:
I paid USD 33 per night for Superior Rice - Field View, but we were on the second floor and the view from the window was blocked by trees. 
Room is clean and spacious. Nice thing is that they left snacks on the coffee table on both days. The breakfast spread is pretty decent for the price. Our basin was kind of choked so water took long to flow. Mattress was a little hard, but I guess that's for what we paid.
They provided free bicycles which were pretty essential to get to the main town area which is about 15 min by cycling. There's nothing much around the hotel though so be prepared for that. Close to the beach, about 10 min by cycling. Overall value matches the price I would say.
reviews.positives: Spacious room, decent food

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: My stay
reviews.text:
The Hotel is nice however I did have to change rooms say first night the noise from outside was crazy at 1:30am. 
Hotel changed my room the next day which was nice of them to do. 

Think with Vietnam itself if your working in Hotel they really should be able on understand basic English. 

Breakfast was basic but trying to find out if the water was from a tap or a bottle was so hard work  this to me is a basic requirement when going to a hotel 

Overall good stay just a few little issues but glad I booked it.

reviews.text:
Stayed in the older wing of the hotel.

All was fine. 

Lots of people at breakfast which made it hard to have a quiet and relaxing time. 

Pool was nice.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Dịch vụ tốt

reviews.title: Can't recommend
reviews.text:
Although the staff and management are lovely and accommodating, I can't help but think the reviews are so positive because people are asked not to write anything negative online as they check out.

We stayed eight nights are were woken by the noise from dawn on five of them- from traffic on the road to noisy people in the pool (reaching us at ear piercing level on the top floor), it was nowhere near the relaxing & replenishing stay we were expecting and we've never left a hotel so exhausted. If the booking hadn't been prepaid, we would definitely have changed hotels.

The rooms are clean, the staff are wonderful but the noise, frankly, unbelievable.

reviews.positives: The warm staff, obliging General Manager - ryan and considerate.

reviews.title: Kind of friendly staff
reviews.text:
I generally enjoyed staying here and stayed four nights extra because it was so relaxing. It is a bit further than the old town but I liked that and looked out onto rice paddy feilds out the back of our room. 

The staff was very sweet and helpful as well.

reviews.title: Giường
reviews.positives: Gần sông

reviews.title: The hotel is okay.
reviews.text: The room is quite beautiful and spacious, although it is far from the old town, it is equipped with all necessary amenities and entertainment, including a billiard table and a nice, clean swimming pool. The buffet is quite good and the staff are friendly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch đẹp, giá hợp lý

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel, diverse services, but the staff's attitude is still poor.
reviews.text:
I booked a Superior room, which is not very spacious but has all the amenities, including a bathtub, TV, hairdryer, clothes hanger, and balcony. The furniture is new and clean. The blankets and sheets still had a strong smell of bleach. My room has a beautiful river view. 
I arrived at 1 PM and was assisted in checking in early. The hotel is located near Cua Dai beach, and it is also nice to borrow a bicycle to ride to the beach. It takes about 15 minutes by motorbike from the hotel to the ancient town. Additionally, there is a shuttle bus service that takes guests to and from the center of Hoi An at fixed times throughout the day. The hotel has a swimming pool and a billiard table, with a spacious and cool area for guests to relax by the pool. There is also a convenient café in front of the hotel.
However, I was very dissatisfied with the attitude of a young male staff member, unclear if he was technical staff or security. In the evening, while my friend and I were playing billiards, two male staff members stood by the pool, far from us, and one abruptly said, "10 PM, we close!" I wasn't sure if he was talking to the other person or to us because his tone was very casual and blunt. If he was addressing us, that was truly very impolite. After speaking, he suddenly turned off the lights by where we were standing, leaving us in darkness, and then turned his back and walked away. I was really annoyed; at the very least, they could have politely informed the guests, waited for us to leave before turning off the lights, rather than acting like they were trying to chase us away. Aside from that, everything was okay. The young receptionist with a round face was very friendly and charming.

reviews.title: OK
reviews.positives:
nhân viên nhiệt tình, thân thiện.
phòng nghỉ sạch sẽ.
vật dụng trong phòng khá đầy đủ. gia đình 4 ng ở thoải mái.

bể bơi khá nhỏ. phòng không có dao cạo râu

reviews.positives: Gia đình mình đã có 1 sự trải nghiệm rất tuyệt vời tại khách sạn này, khi nhận phòng nhân viên lễ tân hổ trợ rất nhiệt tình, phòng rất sạch sẽ, không khí trong lành, đồ ăn sáng cũng khá phong phú, nhân viên đều mĩm cười khi gặp chúng tôi. Sẽ quay lại lần nữa trong mùa hè tới.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Nice place to stay but is located far to the central point
reviews.text: Nice hotel to stay but it took around 10 mins by car to the central of Hoi An

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Огромный двухкомнатный номер с двумя санузлами: в одном оборудована ванна, в другом просторная душевая кабина. В каждой комнате холодильник, телевизор, шкаф. Есть все, что нужно для отличного отдыха. Отель на живописном берегу реки с рощицами бамбука и пальмами. До ближайшего пляжа 1,5 км, но мы в этом отеле в третий раз, так что были к этому готовы. В отеле бесплатно дают велосипеды. Также мы ходили пешком в Старый город - около 40 минут. Особенно хочется отметить дружелюбность и готовность помочь персонала. Спасибо! Мы обязательно еще постараемся сюда приехать!

reviews.title: Excellent staff and hotel
reviews.text: The staff are super helpful and friendly. The breakfast spread was better than some four star hotels. The pool was great but the construction behind the hotel really hampered the day swimming experience. They have a shuttle to take you into central Hoi An with many pickup and drop off times. Unfortunately the bed comfort and bathroom situations left a lot to be desired. Overall though a great hotel for the price we paid.
reviews.positives: The breakfast. The staff. And the shuttle service.

reviews.title: A good choice
reviews.text: We stayed here for 1 night, last week and it was more than adequate. The bed was so huge and really comfy. The shower was nice and hot and the buffet breakfast the next morning was really good. There was lots on offer and you can choose your style of eggs when you walk in the dining room.  The staff are so sweet and really looked after us. We will book here again. It's in the middle of the old town and An Bang beach. Around 10 minutes on a scooter.

reviews.text:
We were looking for something a bit quieter and have loved every night of our rice paddies view and spacious room. 

The staff are friendly and helpful, and there are plenty of restaurants and laundromats close by. They offer free bikes you can ride into town and head into the center of Hoi An for more shopping or restaurants but I"very much loved our stay so much.

reviews.title: Good clean hotel
reviews.text: The hotel itself was very good, good rooms, pool, free bikes, good breakfast, however it is too far from the main streets of town. We walked it and it is 5 km and took nearly an hour, they do have a free shuttle bus that runs to the old town about 8 times a day, but if you need to go to have several suit fittings, pick up shoes, see the lanterns, go to the night markets and eat, you can be going up there many times in a day. However on saying this a taxi fare is only about 50,000 dong
reviews.positives: Clean, comfortable, friendly

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very nice hotel. It is some 20 minutes walk to the beach and around 45 minutes on foot to town (if you dont want to walk, you can go by bike or by taxi). Absolutely wonderful staff! The room was spacious, clean and cozy. The hotel is great value for money, totally worth it!

reviews.title: Good hotel...will come back here
reviews.positives: Friendly staffs, nice room, good food

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Most everything

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: We arrived late afternoon. Room was ready. Comfortable but basic. Lobby is nice. Staff welcomed us and informed us of the facilities. We use the bike and had fun riding around town. The location of the hotel is a little away from the town center and we needed numerous ride of taxi. However there is a bus shuttle a few times a day. We had an excellent stay at the Aurora hotel and would recommend it. However I consider this a 3 stars hotel to my standard.
reviews.positives: Free bike. Breakfast. Free shuttle to town.

reviews.title: Great Hotel 2nd time we’ve stayed here
reviews.positives:
This is the second time we have stayed in this hotel and would definitely come back again. We were again in a 3 week motorbike adventure throughout Vietnam and picked this hotel again because it had everything that we needed pool, good breakfast, laundry service, quite central but far enough away from the main noise / centre, free secure parking for our motorbikes and free use of cycles to explore on a more leisurely pace. 
Even the staff we meet last year recognised us for last year ( please see attached pictures )
Best Regards
Eddie (Robin / Superman from Scotland 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿)

reviews.title: Comfortable & Pleasant
reviews.text: The staff at this hotel made our stay very pleasant. On arrival the receptionist, whose name is GREENIE greeted us very warmly and in a courteous manner. She made us feel very welcoming and homely. She provided excellent customer service and is an asset to the hotel. The location is in a quiet area which is what we required for a relaxing stay. The environment  is clean and the room was very spacious and comfortable.  The breakfast buffet was satisfying. It should be noted that the server in the restaurant whose name is MAYA has a very pleasant personality and assisted us in the selection of our lunch menu. She  listened attentively to what was required  and provided good advice. She is an asset to the hotel. A very comfortable stay.
reviews.positives: Very helpful and courteous staff / Quiet location / Clean environment

reviews.title: Good locations and breakfast
reviews.positives: Overall good quality and good location

reviews.title: A little gem
reviews.text: An amazing stay. Ryan the GM and his team Tommy, Ann, Julia and Alan do a fabulous job of making you welcome. Had a great boat ride down the river with cocktails at a sister restaurant. Food is excellent. Shuttle into town is very useful. Only improvement would be to invest in slightly better mattresses.
reviews.positives: Staff, staff and staff.

reviews.title: Great little hotel in a good location. Staff are amazing.
reviews.positives: The location was good and the staff were excellent. They took us as an emergency booking after previous accommodation fell through.

reviews.title: Nice staff & acceptable prize
reviews.text: Hotel is much better than its prize, beautiful farm&river view. For those who not yet come to country sides of VN, to find peaceful feelings, u should try...
reviews.positives: Nice staff, suitable for couple, compare to prize

reviews.title: Perfect for what it was
reviews.positives: Really nice big bed and was made each morning

reviews.title: No elevator but have excellent breakfast
reviews.text: Our only problem is they gave us a room on the 4th floor with my senior  parent and we have to take the stairs. The guards had been helpful in bringing our luggage. Breakfast is amazing. Location wise, it's on the quiet side of Hoi An, 3km from ancient town and 2.5 km from Coconut Village. Grabe is quite expensive in Hoi An than Da nang.

reviews.title: Happy, helpful staff made it a “we’ll come again”  stay
reviews.positives:
All staff were so helpful and cheerful 
Room was spacious, clean with nice little balcony
reviews.negatives: VERY little, maybe a walk-in shower instead of over bath

reviews.title: Good stay, but needs better facilities & veg options
reviews.text:
The rooms were really nice, and the cleanliness was well maintained throughout our stay.

However, there was no changing room available after using the swimming pool, which was quite inconvenient. This is something that should definitely be improved.

Also, vegetarian options were very limited—only fruits were available. The menu should include more proper vegetarian food choices.

Overall, a comfortable stay, but a few improvements would make it much better.

reviews.title: Would highly recommend for a quiet trip
reviews.positives: Very clean, beds are very comfy and staff were very nice
reviews.negatives: A bit out of the old town but they do offer a shuttle bus in the morning and afternoon

reviews.title: Friendly staff, good breakfast
reviews.text: It is a cozy clean hotel by the river. The sun never shines on the pool, since the hotel blocks it thru the day.

reviews.title: A stand out Hotel in Hoi An
reviews.positives: What a lucky find for us, our hotel cancelled at the last minute and after spending 2 days here I could not have been more happy about it. Reception was warm and welcome, the rooms exceptional, pool was clean with towels and beds. Location perfect

reviews.title: Happy couple
reviews.text: We book last minute and manage to find this hotel, we are very happy, the pool area today is a bit noisy but otherwise it’s good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Absolutely everything. Vinh the manager, is an asset to this hotel. He really looked after us, and nothing was ever too much trouble.Thank you Vinh
The hotel was in a fab location, close to lots of restaurants and shops. 
We have an amazing view of the rice fields, so special. 
The rooms were cleaned daily, fresh towels, water. 
The breakfast was delicious, buffet style, lots of options, both cold and hot. 
We were lucky to be here for Tet, and the hotel put on a night with entertainment and food, and it was fabulous. 
We were due to stay for 5 nights, and we extended our stay by 5 nights. 
I highly recommend this hotel, amazing value for money. We will be back

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Vi trí thuận tiện, có bãi đậu xe ô tô, nhân viên nhiệt tình.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice room, good views and friendly staff

reviews.title: Aurora stay
reviews.text: Good stay , big room ,  good wi-fi , great breakfast , helpful staff. In the quiet part of Hoi a but liked it and only cheap grab ride to old town and downtown. Back two unit blocks don’t have lifts, front one does. Has one of the worst pool tables I have played on but stilled loved it.

reviews.title: Great Hotel with good location and lovely staff
reviews.positives: Breakfast, swimming pool, staff, location close enough to most things but also far enough away to be peaceful, secure underground parking for our motorcycles, free cycles subject to availability, to explore at our leisure. We had a 3 bed 🛌 room as were on a lads motorcycle adventure through Vietnam and this hotel ticked all the boxes would definitely stay again😉👍🏻

reviews.title: Nice atmosphere
reviews.text: I liked my room and breakfast. The pool was nice too.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The room was clean and cozy. The swimming pool was nice and very peaceful. Most importantly, the staff was very friendly. I had to leave quite early so I could not attend breakfast. However the staff had made me an extensive breakfast package.

reviews.title: Everything from good to perfect
reviews.text: I felt happy except for 1 thing: no elevator in vilas section

reviews.title: We will be back to Aurora Riverside Hoi An
reviews.positives: The hospitality at Aurora Riverside Hoi An Hotel was spectacular!! The nicest and most accommodating staff I have ever met. The rooms are really beautifully. Also the breakfast was amazing, good selection of fruits, veggies, baked goods and hot dishes. In addition you can also order dishes like pancakes, Bun, Pho and eggs for free.

reviews.title: Disappointed about Agoda unhonestly
reviews.text:
I have looked at the Deal on Agoda night before and they post a deal something 75-80% off but in fact they dramatically push it up then pull it down to exactly the price that Hotel (Hoi An Aurora residence) offered.

How cheating Agoda are !! Very disappointed with Agoda !!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: My family and I had a wonderful experience at Aurora Riverside Hoi An, the hotel is very nice and wonderful, the rooms are very nice and comfortable, the staff is friendly, I really like the breakfast, very diverse and changes every day. I will continue to choose Aurora Hoi An for my next trip.

reviews.title: nice room but the cold tap is running hot water..
reviews.text: nice room but the cold tap is running hot water..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The property has several restaurants and convenience stores around. The room is really clean and breakfast buffet has lots of choices.The staff were also really accommodating and it was easy to book tours through the hotel staff. Will definitely stay here again if i'm ever back in Hoi An.

reviews.title: Pleasant Stay
reviews.text: Spacious clean room with balcony view. Location not too close to anything but there's free bike rentals and shuttles. Breakfasts is better than average. Swimming pool was nice. Hotel across from the swimming pool is not Aurora.

reviews.title: Great staff in a very pleasant hotel
reviews.positives: The rooms were cleaned and the staff was great. Our plane landed around midnight and we booked the airport transfer thru the hotel - a very convenient way to go from the airport to the hotel especially if you are visiting Hoi An for the first time. The breakfast was delicious with enough dishes to try. Special thanks to all the staff especially the front of manager Vinh who looked after us.

reviews.title: Good service
reviews.text: In my view, it's beautiful and clean room. No menu in room.

reviews.title: Amazing property!!!
reviews.positives: I had a fantastic experience at this hotel! The staff were incredibly welcoming, and the services – including the free bike rentals and shuttle bus – made getting around so easy. The spa was also a real highlight, offering a great way to unwind. A special mention to the hotel’s café, Dirty Lips – the drinks were delicious, and the view of the river and street was beautiful. Perfect spot to relax and enjoy the scenery. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Lovely place
reviews.text: Stayed for two nights and had a great time. The staff was super friendly and very helpful. The room was clean with a nice view over the river. The best thing about this hotel was the breakfast and free rentals of bicycles. I would stay there again.

reviews.title: Highly Recommend!!!
reviews.positives: Everything: Beds, pillows and showers amazing. Cleanest place we've stayed in on our travels. Particular to staff member. We would come back in a heartbeat and would recommend anyone stay here.

reviews.title: Friendly famy oriented hotel
reviews.text: Everything was fine, a small problem I had with plumbing was successfully fixed immediately I reported it. Nice location but a bit far from the central district. Pool was always full of happy children enjoying their holiday. Breakfast range good, shuttle bus service efficient.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I had a really pleasant stay at this hotel. The free bicycle was a nice touch, making it easy to explore the area at my own pace. I also appreciated the free shuttle bus service to Hoi An Old Town, which was very convenient for getting around. The spa experience was a highlight – it was the perfect way to unwind after a day of sightseeing. The staff were all very friendly and professional. Definitely a place I’d consider returning to!

reviews.title: Stay at Riverside Aurora
reviews.text:
Stayed there 10 nights in new part of the hotel.
Big room, huge good bed and balcony to enjoy the afternoon sun
Due to new building there is draught between the blocks and the pool has no sunshine.
All facilities (beaches and Hoi An town) can be reached easily by bike.
We can recommend this hotel for its excellent value for money.

reviews.title: GREAT
reviews.positives: I enjoy the peaceful atmosphere at Aurora Riverside Hotel Hoi An, with its beautiful river views, comfortable rooms, and excellent service. The location is also perfect for exploring both the city and nearby beaches.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: Lovely staff, nice double rooms, great location, very clean

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Rooms were very spacious and the beds were so comfy. Lovely balcony looking over the rice fields.

reviews.title: Great Hotel to stay!
reviews.text:
We stayed at Aurora Riverside Hotel for 4 days. It's locktest a little bit out of town, at the edge of the city, but they offer a free shuttle service. The viel on the rooftop is amazing- you can see the river, hoi an and the rice fields. 

The staff is very friendly and very helpful. We had a real warm welcome and our stay there was very comfortable. They offer a breakfast-buffet, with a variety of breads, fruits, local and western food and preparation of omelettes etc. The breakfast-staff is quick in refilling your coffee cup and very attentive. There is allways time for a little friendly chat with the guests.

We enjoyed our stay very much. Thank you for the wonderful time. We hope we can come back some time.
reviews.positives: Nice Rooms, good breakfast, great view

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: The hotel was the best we've stayed at, with great facilities, activists, and staff members.

reviews.title: Beautiful rooms, nice staff
reviews.text:
We had only booked this hotel for three nights, but we ended up staying over a week here. The rooms are very big and comfortable with huge bathtub. The staff was very friendly and helpful.
It's a bit too far to walk to the old city, but the hotel offer shuttle bud. We experienced that the shuttle bus didn't pick us up when we were going back, but the hotel refunded the taxi. 
There is a swimming pool, but next to it there was a construction site, so it was not really possible to relax by the pool.
From the room we could hear anyone talking in the corridor or the stairs, this could be a problem in the morning/evening when the hotel was fully booked.
reviews.positives: Clean rooms, comfortable beds, nice staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The rooms are very clean and beautiful, and the bathrooms are very good. The hotel staff members are very friendly and helpful, and they were happy to assist us with any inquiries

reviews.title: Relaxing by the river
reviews.text:
Great atmosphere in this hotel, staff very friendly and helpful, can hire bikes even late,also my departure was late afternoon so I was given much understanding regarding staying cool, clean and comfortable. In particular, the reception lady Thuy is a delight: helpful, attentive and humerous. Thanks Aurora!

Phil
reviews.positives: Staff, rooms, free bikes and minibus

reviews.title: Lovely place. Friendly staffs
reviews.positives:
Staffs are very helpful. The room is very clean.
Good price. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Relaxing stay
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, nice rooms, nice environment

reviews.title: a great experience,lovely hotel
reviews.positives: The highly experienced concierge at the Aurora Hotel Hoi An was able to help me plan my trip.

reviews.title: A lovely short stay
reviews.text:
We stayed for 1 night at this lovely hotel. Don’t be intimidated by the foyer, the rooms themselves are modern, western and well-appointed. Our room (room 507 facing the street and the river) was beautiful with a ‘Japanese’ feel to it – a huge (king?) comfy mattress on a low base and low crafted timber furniture added to the theme. We also had a quaint little balcony overlooking the street which was great to sit with a coffee in the early morning watching the sun rise and the bustling street come to life. We also had a big hot tub!

Perhaps the highlight of the hotel is the AMAZING view from the level 6 roof terrace. You get 360º views of Hoi An from the ocean all the way to the mountains. This view is very unique in Hoi An as almost no other buildings are this tall. Whilst this space is not really being utilized at the moment, the staff told us that they plan to serve drinks up there soon. We also enjoyed using the infinity swimming pool. While the pool’s outlook is not very nice, the staff said that plans are to address this in May this year.
Breakfast was solid. There was a chef standing by cooking the fry pan cooking eggs and pho to order. We ate seconds! The coffee was fresh, hot and strong.

We would happily stay here again.
reviews.positives: Great room, incredible view and friendly staff

reviews.title: Nice ! Will come back 😍
reviews.positives: Location is 3km from the old town, free bicycles  go to oldtown. The room is small but clean, with a balcony overlooking the quite chill swimming pool. The swimming pool is clean and the space is decorated quite beautifully. There are many lovely virtual photo taking angles. Friendly and enthusiastic staff. A suitable resting place in Hoi An for couples.

reviews.title: Good time
reviews.text: We have good time here, thanks

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very friendly and helpful staff. I arrived before check in time and they made special arrangements to accommodate me. The views of the rice fields are absolutely lovely. Such a serene beautiful area. I would highly recommend staying here. All the receptionists have been so kind and pleasant.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: Nice place, not the view we desired but a great breakfast and friendly staff made up for it.

reviews.title: Good hotel, Nice view ( we had the river view). Staff are very welcoming and helpful
reviews.positives: Clean and confortable room

reviews.title: Nice night away - would come again
reviews.text: We decided to stay last minute and was happy with the room and price we paid. Nice and simple and we enjoyed our evening in the room.

reviews.title: Extremely clean and highly comfortable stay - would reccomend especially for couples!
reviews.positives: Extremely clean and staff were very attentive at all times. Really happy with the location and the assistance given by the lobby staff. The manager was also extremely kind in preparing our breakfast to go when we were rushing to the airport! Excellent stay overall.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location and great staff

reviews.title: 4 hour Day stay
reviews.text: With the midday heat we needed somewhere to cool and rest and this hotel was perfect. We checked in straight, could use the pool, had a nice room to rest in. Absolutely what we needed.

reviews.title: Comfortable and enjoyable
reviews.positives: Clean and the staff were super helpful in every way

reviews.title: Super worth the money
reviews.text: Wow, it's really worth the money. It's only about 2-3 km from Hoi An. Very clean.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
A great place to stay in Hoi an  between the old town and the beach situated across the road from the river.
Very clean rooms with a beautiful pool, helpful and friendly staff and a nice buffet breakfast.

reviews.title: Great staff, big rooms
reviews.text: Hotel rooms are large, clean with decent decor. Hotel staff are great, especially Sophia!

reviews.title: Nice staff, Acceptable price
reviews.text:
The staffs are nice and helpful, always have a smile on their face.
The room is tidy but there are many insects and mosquitoes in the bathroom and we don't know how they come into our room. Many mosquitoes outside after sun set and we cannot go out to the balcony.
The river view is nice.
The breakfast is on average, not so many choices but it's okay.

reviews.title: Staff were very friendly and helpful in planning a tour and a taxi back to Da Nang airport..
reviews.text: As there was no driver available shuttle, Manager paid for taxi to town center and back to hotel when done. I thought that was great customer service.

reviews.title: Everything is great
reviews.text:
Except we request for higher room but we got level 2 only, everything is great. The facilities is great, room is very clean. You guys have very nice, professional and very helpful staffs.

We had a great 3 nights stay with nothing to complain !

reviews.title: Overall very happy
reviews.text:
Nothing to fault.
The villa A2 is new and very roomy, lots of natural light.
Staff very helpful and friendly.
Wifi and internet is outstanding and very fast.
Breakfast variety could be better!

reviews.title: Good hotel to stay
reviews.text: The staff in the hotel are very helpful. Hotel provide shuttle service to ancient town is awesome!

reviews.title: Lovely stay
reviews.text: This hotel was fantastic. The staff were great and very helpful and even though it is outside the old town, the hotel has shuttles throughout the day that will do drop off & pick up and they also had bicycles that guests may use, free of charge.

reviews.title: Peaceful and impressed
reviews.text: The location is awesome. The staffs are friendly and kind. Food is good also

reviews.title: Recent stay in Aurora: convenient and relaxing!
reviews.text: The location is very convenient (close to town and the beach, but a bit out of the hustle and bustle) and I particularly appreciated the convenience of the free bikes as well as the clean pool which helped to cool off after a day in the heat.  Breakfast was generous and good (nice variety of food) and the rooms were exceptionally clean, also very spacious and comfortable.  I had an issue with the shower in my first room (the drain wasn't working and emitting a bad smell, probably a maintenance issue and not something cleaning staff could have fixed) and while the front desk staff weren't very helpful (giving me polite smiles but lots of excuses for why they couldn't solve the problem or help me to get a different room) once I spoke with the manager, he solved the problem within minutes and switched me to a new room that was great, so the rest of my stay was very pleasant. I appreciated his helpfulness and professionalism and hope his staff learns that it's not enough to just give guests polite smiles -- good customer service means helping guests to resolve any issues they might be having that are affecting the quality of their stay. Overall though, I definitely recommend this hotel and think that it's great value for the price.

reviews.title: Quiet, friendly staff
reviews.text: I love the location of the Hotel.  It's right between the old town and the beach.

reviews.title: Quiet area, friendly staff
reviews.text: I love the view at the back of the villas.

reviews.title: Clean hotel with helpful staff
reviews.text: We enjoyed our time at Aurora. The hotel is simple and clean and the staff are very helpful.
reviews.positives: Staff, pool and location

reviews.title: Great value for stay
reviews.text: I stayed one night only because the location is quite far from town area. There is no much night activity after 9pm. The room is clean and bed is comfort. Pool is small and full of guests. The hotel offer a large variety of delicious foods for breakfast.
reviews.positives: Cleanliness, Breakfast, Staff Performance

reviews.title: Perfect stay for me
reviews.text: This was a great stay for me because it was quiet most of the time and I had my privacy in one of the lower floor rooms. The room was spacious and there was a patio. The breakfast had several choices and was very good. Those serving the breakfast were gracious and very helpful as was the rest of the staff. I would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: Great value accommodation^^
reviews.text: We arrived earlier than the 2 PM check-in time, dropped off our luggage, and borrowed bikes to visit the beach. It was my husband's dream to ride bikes together as a family of five with the kids, and it was wonderful! We couldn't take the free shuttle to Old Town because the timing didn't match. Although it was a bit far from Old Town, taking a Grab to the dawn market and Old Town was quick! We also used the pool and had fun playing pool. The male staff member who lent us the bikes was friendly, and the female staff member was also kind. I want to go again! 😍

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text:
Phòng khá rộng có hai phòng riêng biệt 
Khách sạn sạch sẽ thoát mát
Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm thuận tiện đi lại 
Không xô bồ ồn ào
Nhìn chung rất hài lòng

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great stay. Staff friendly and accommodating. Swimming pool area a cool retreat from the heat. Moon spa next door was exceptional. Massage facials, eyebrow/lip tattoos - it had it all. Quality at incredible prices. The girl running it was fantastic - a lot of fun.

reviews.title: ok
reviews.text: ok

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything is fine. Clean. The pool is very nice. Convenient location for moving around. The only issue is that last time I booked a room for you, you went with a child born in 2019 who hasn't turned 6 yet, but the hotel charged extra for the child. When I asked, the hotel didn't reply. The app also automatically rated it well even though I didn't rate it. Please review whether the front desk staff has charged extra for the child who is not yet 6 years old.

reviews.title: Great little boutique hotel! Def Recommend
reviews.text:
We booked this hotel during a crisis. Our original Airbnb was infested with bugs and we had to find a new place to stay the same day. 

Agoda had a great deal for this hotel. Although not near the beach like we originally wanted, we actually found the location of Hoi An Aurora beautiful. You're right on the main road that takes you into the old town. And you have the river in front of the property. There was a cemetery behind the property but it didn't bother me at all. Overall, the location resembles old countryside Vietnam and it was a pleasant surprise. 

They have a mid-size pool with lounge chairs and a pool table. They had breakfast buffet in the mornings. It was honestly okay, but overall a good value. There's a cute cafe attached that sells decent coffee. There's also a small family owned bar next door that is worth checking out! 

The staff at Hoi An Aurora are lovely and very helpful. We got some upgrades on our rooms since they were available. We actually added an extra night to our stay because we wanted more time in Hoi An. We had to move rooms for one night since our rooms had already been booked. The hotel gave us the same rate for the extra night. 

Overall, I would stay here again. It's a good value and the staff are attentive and their rooms are very clean and fill all the basic requirements in my book. It's not too far from old town, and the neighboring shops and stores are nice to walk through.

reviews.title: Nice little hotei
reviews.text:
It’s a great little Hotel it’s kinda basic but super clean and the staff  are amazing and help any way they can.
It’s about 3 k from  old town and 1.5 k from the beach  so a little way out from stuff . But as Grab taxi only costs you AUD $2.00 to get anywhere it’s a good spot. There is also a great restaurant and bar next door called Bong.
Will definitely stay again next time I’m back.

reviews.title: very friendly stuff - clean room and nice service
reviews.text: very friendly stuff - clean room and nice service

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text:
Pros - big clean rooms with great location 

Cons - the pool is in the centre of the hotel overlooked by all the rooms and backing on to the restaurant... not an ideal.locatopn for a pool

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
Great hotel to stay. 
Very friendly staff and location is very nice near the river and a short ride with free bikes to the beach. 
There is a free shuttle bus to Hoi An Town. 
Breakfast was very good 
Staff are very friendly.

reviews.title: Good hotel catering for foreigners
reviews.text:
The hotel is well located near beach and river with shuttle bus into ancient city. Bicycles, in good condition,  were also provided.
Rooms are spacious and well.maintained.
Staff were very friendly, efficient and considerate.
But this is a hotel for foreign visitors.
My Vietnamese partner and I prefer asian orientated hotels. For instance , the bed was far too soft even after we stripped off extra padding : he slept on the floor ! Breakfast could be more ethnic.
But, I digress. This is an excellent hotel for foreign tourists. Book with confidence. 
Come and enjoy Vietnam : You will be well looked after. Enjoy it.

reviews.title: Very very good
reviews.text: 5 stars for this hotel. Warmly and nicely welcome when we entered. They also giving us  helpful information when travel around HOIAN. Morning buffet couldnt be good any more. Swiming pool with nice view and has a sauna tub. and yet, the hotel room is clean, nice decorate, and perfect. Highly recommended

reviews.title: Well English Speaking
reviews.text: A lot of foreigners stay here! Good place for staying.

reviews.title: Great little hotel
reviews.text: Well positioned midway between Hoi An old town and the beaches, and right on the river, Aurora is a lovely little hotel. Set up around the pool it encourages you to interact with your fellow guests (especially if you have two small inquisitive children!). The staff were wonderfully helpful. Free bike hire to encourage you to cycle to town, beach, or just explore. And also a free shuttle ride into and out of the town if you don't fancy the cycle. We had a great time in Hoi An, and a lot of that was down to the wonderful hotel.

reviews.title: Would definitely return!
reviews.text: Arrived late evening after the restaurant/bar was closed but was offered a free motorcyle  collection service from the nearby mini-mart.  The staff are very compliant.  The room was to die for!  My daughter felt like a princess with her glass walled bathroom.  Fantastic view over the paddy fields and enjoyed watching the wildlife in the early morning.   The included breakfast is very comprehensive and comprises a fusion of western and oriental cuisine.  Many restaurants/shops are a short walk away.  The only downside is that the old town of Hoi An is 35 mins. brisk walk.  This is helped by the free shuttle bus or cycle loan, taxis are also plentiful and cheap.  We are travelling round S.E. Asia and this stay was one of our highlights.  Hoi An town is a must see destination.

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text: We had a great time and qould certainly go back.
reviews.positives: Staff, location, breakfast

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text:
Great stay. Very clean, staff helpful. Free bike hire, can get motorbikes from next door. 
Yummy buffet breakfast. 
20 min walk from the center but close to some food establishments. Would recommend slow food a couple of doors down. 
Beds super comfy and room over all was clean and spacious. We really enjoyed our stay.
reviews.positives: Beds, clean, staff

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text:
Amazing place to stay, really relaxing with a really helpful staff. You can get bikes from the hotel at no extra cost which was also nice.
Overall I recommend this place !
reviews.positives: Staff, room, location

reviews.title: Clean,  Friendly and helpful staff
reviews.text: Excellent
reviews.positives: Clean,  Friendly staff and comfortable room

reviews.title: Amazing stay with helpful staff
reviews.text: When we were at Aurora , my wife was sick. The GM helped with the trip to hospital, interpreting and getting everything organised. He even sent up some chicken soup afterwards. kind and caring staff. Just wonderful
reviews.positives: Room was wonderfully comfortable, staff were extremely helpful, food and drink service top notch,I would highly recommend this place to anyone.

reviews.title: Wonderful Hotel!
reviews.text: I had a wonderful 3 days at Aurora. Great breakfast, absolutely fantastic coffee. I had a wonderful room with balcony and huge comfortable bed! Best part is the wonderful staff! Ann who works in the restaurant is a joy!
reviews.positives: Comfort, staff, value

reviews.title: Wonderful Hotel!!!
reviews.positives: Great staff, amazing rooms, wonderful price!

reviews.title: A Little Gem of a Hotel
reviews.text: A great find. The service was superb. The room was nice, modern, clean and comfortable. The location was just right, about half way between the old town Hoi An and Cua Dai beach. Stay there, it ticks all the boxes!
reviews.positives: Service, service, service

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.text: Stayed for one night at this hotel and the staffs were very friendly and helpful. Shout out to Thuy from the reception because she had helped us with all of the information that we wanted in order to continue with our trip. She was very thorough with how to get to places and prices for each option. Thank you for your service
reviews.positives: Bike Rental, Staff, service

reviews.title: Strand direkt um die Ecke!
reviews.text: We enjoyed our stay at the Hofel very much. The rooms are clean and Big, the Pool nice only a little Bit more Space around the Pool to lay down would be needed. You can borrow bicycles for free and in 5 min you are at the Beach. The Shuttle to the City is free, otherwise a Taxi Costs around 3$. I recommend this Hotel highly!
reviews.positives: Pool, Staff, Roomsize

reviews.title: Overall great place to stay :)
reviews.text: The stay at the hotel was very comfortable. Thuy, the staff member at the reception was very welcoming and helpfull. As for the restaurant staff they were very kind and attended to anything we needed. Very friendly environment, would defenitely reccomend the hotel to others.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, clean facility and close to beach

reviews.title: Great place for a relaxed and enjoyable holiday
reviews.text: We had a most enjoyable stay at the Aurora Riverside. The staff were so friendly, and went out of their way to make us feel comfortable and welcome. The hotel is clean, modern and comfortable. The pool is an excellent retreat on hot days. It is cove ineptly located with respect both to Cua Dai beaches and Hoi An. The hotel's free shuttle bus was also convenient. I thoroughly recommend the Aurora Riverside.
reviews.positives: Staff were friendly and thoroughly helpful. Lovely location. Great facilities.

reviews.title: Charming view and comfortable accommodation,
reviews.text: Most enjoyable, hotel services fantastic, close to beach and markets, hotel staff excellent, I highly recommend to all travelers.
reviews.positives: Views, excellent hotel staff, clean and comfortable

reviews.title: Great hotel with lovely staff
reviews.text: Fantastic staff were amazing
reviews.positives: The staff, free bike hire and the pool

reviews.title: Great location, great customer services
reviews.text: wonderful, we enjoy the pool, the big room and warm welcome from hotel staff. Only thing is not good is breakfast buffet does not have many food, the rest are just impressive.
reviews.positives: Great location, great customer services, awesome room facilities and size

reviews.title: A great hotel
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, spacious room, great view

reviews.title: Everything as described
reviews.text:
We had a great time. The saff is very friendly and you get great value for this price.
Would do it again anytime.

reviews.title: Very nice Hotel
reviews.text: Room is spacious and clean. Breakfast included a wide variety of dishes.

reviews.title: Good, clean and excelent price
reviews.text: This hotel is outside Hoi an but in the main road to the town or to the beach, just in the middle. It has a nice pool and good breakfast. We used the triple room  in the 4th floor and is really good with nice views. i don’t know why they closed the exterior window shutters with so an amazing view. They also offer free taxi ride to the old town in the afternoon.  We had a good time staying here for so an amazing price. Rooms are not luxurious but charming, clean and  big. They also gave us a discount on the room service. Ban mi were really good.

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text: Stayed for one night, check-in was easy and quick. Staff helped carry luggage to the room. The room was spacious and the bed was comfortable. Everything worked properly. The view from the patio wasn't all it was suggested to be, but that's whatever. Nice pool as well. No elevators to the top floors, at least that I saw. So you have to walk up the stairs. Approximately a 10-minute grab ride to the Center of Hoi An / Old Town area.  Would stay here again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: A fantastic apartment which was a great location to explore the area via the free pushbikes.  Spacious room.

reviews.title: Great price location
reviews.text:
Fantastic value nice pool and close to beach and short ride into town with free cycle. Handy shops,
restaurants, bars and convenience stores close. 
Views over the river great

reviews.title: 9/10  GREAT STAY
reviews.text: Very very clean , bright . Very helpful staff and great breakfast included.  Bed was clean and  good

reviews.title: I would stay here again
reviews.text: Helpful and friendly staff. Very comfortable bed, satellite TV perfect for chillin.  The pool is big enough for short Lengths. Breakfast was ok.  Free push bike was a bonus

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Yes

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
Loved my stay here
Prices were very reasonable and the staff was very helpful and friendly throughout. They also gave free cycles to roam around which was a big plus and great service overall

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It's a bit far from the center (about 2-3km) but perfectly fine for the price. Clean and suitable for short stays.

reviews.title: Saigon Scooter Centre tour group Hue to Saigon
reviews.text: Great value , good location and fantastic staff. Nothing was too much trouble. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Quiet accommodation
reviews.text: It was spacious and good for the price~~^^ It felt like a typical Vietnamese house! It had a bit of an old vibe but was quiet and had a large room for family use with 2 single beds and 1 double bed. It was a two-room place and had 2 bathrooms!! The swimming pool is deeper than an adult, so kids just need to wear life vests to go in!! Having a field view is really great!! Riding a bike around was fun, and I rode my bike to the beach, which was a really fun challenge! Together with cars and motorcycles, haha. It was a bit far from the old town and downtown, so other than taking Grab, it was fine. If you're looking for a quiet and peaceful place, I recommend it!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, with sufficient amenities. The staff is friendly, located 2km from the city center, but it takes only 3-5 minutes by motorbike to get there. Definitely worth the experience, will come back again.

reviews.title: Canadian teavellers
reviews.text: We stayed here 9 nights and everything was exceptional. Staff, cleanliness, breakfast until 10:00, smoothie bar attached, free bikes, close enough to beach to bike and less than $3.00 most days for a Grab. Would stay there again, actually tried to stay longer but they were sold out!

reviews.title: Excellent stay, but not in town
reviews.text: Spotless facilities right beside the coconut river and an easy walk into the old town, or grab taxi.  I also had fun exploring the areas immediately surrounding the hotel which were just beautiful to meander on foot or by bike.  Didn't use any of the facilities of the hotel but did capitalize on the mad monkey hostel next door for a few much needed beers after touring on foot all day.  As mentioned by the hotel, this location is not close to the old town but they do run a shuttle every evening.  Grab is also available but only to the designated pickup areas in the old town.  I also enjoyed the beach communities that are close by over the bridge, a very laid back beach vibe that is worth checking out.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean and fragrant. I haven't had the chance to experience other services like the buffet or the swimming pool due to the short stay; however, I am still satisfied with the price paid.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The accommodation is clean and airy, has beautiful scenery, and relatively good amenities.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, giá tốt, nhân viên phục vụ rất dễ thương và đầu bếp rất giỏi

reviews.title: A VFM stay
reviews.text: Slightly away from main attractions of Hoi An and therefore much more reasonably priced. Maintained very well with focus on cleanliness and hygiene. Friendly staff. Stayed in the family connecting room. Very convenient with young children. Bicycles readily available for ride into Hoi An town, beach etc. Had a very comfortable stay

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: The property offered a fantastic breakfast spread, spacious rooms, and a lovely pool that looks inviting. The location was superb and the hotel provides free bicycle for their guests. It's extremely useful when we cycled to see the paddy fields right behind the hotel. The staff were friendly and attentive. While the amenities could use a bit of improvement, the overall experience was good. Will definitely recommend it to friends

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Near the city center  
Friendly and enthusiastic staff  
Buffet with few dishes but delicious  
Clean and airy rooms  
Especially, the pool has a beautiful view and is clean

reviews.title: Clean room, friendly staff
reviews.text: I have 2 days here, the staff is friendly and cheerful, the room is clean, and it's about a 1 km bike ride to the beach. The breakfast is not very diverse but it's quite okay.

reviews.title: Good stay, good location and staff
reviews.text: Tam was very kind and helpful, she ensured that a vegetarian meal was packed for me early morning since I had to catch a flight. Thank you.
reviews.response:
Dear Karan, 
It was truly a pleasure to have you stay at Aurora Riverside Hoi An recently. Thank you for your time in providing us with your lovely feedback. We are so pleased to hear of your overall excellent experience and we cannot wait to welcome you back again soon. 
Best regards,
Aurora Team

reviews.title: Very nice small hotel
reviews.text: Very clean and comfortable. Seemed like a fairly new build so everything was still in good condition. Our deluxe room was a good size, and the mattress was enormous and comfortable. Staff were helpful. About 25 mins walk from the old town, but there is a free shuttle bus and also free bikes to borrow.

reviews.title: Quiet side of the town
reviews.text: near the beach,better take a bike

reviews.title: awesome services
reviews.text: the staff is helpful & location is ideal with shuttle bus provided by hotel. did offer some valuable day trip from hotel which is worth a visit ❤

reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.text: Love this hotel. People are very friendly, room is clean. Will be back!

reviews.title: Nice room & friendly staff
reviews.text: Good hotel for relaxation time.

reviews.title: Almost perfect hotel
reviews.text: This hotel is really really almost perfect :) and service, and breakfast, and cleanliness. Only location is not so good, but in the same time they are really trying to solve this problem and offer free bicycles or free shuttle bus to the town.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel in hoi an
reviews.text: Decent room. Beautiful hotel in white. Lovely swimming pool. The breakfast was good. Located about 4km away from hoi an center so if travel by motorbike or bycicle it would be a good choice. Quiet and peaceful place. Would definitely come back

reviews.title: 4 day stay in May 2016
reviews.text:
This place was recommended to us by our daughter when she stayed here in January 2016 whilst travelling with a group of 20-21 year olds.

The hotel is in a great location - about 15 minutes ride on a bicycle (free from the hotel) or 5 minutes in the Hotel courtesy bus to the lovely town of Hoi An.

Breakfast was superb, the staff were extremely helpful in organising tours, and onward travel tickets. Hugh was especially helpful in helping us to organize our onward journey to Nga Trang.

We would have no hesitation in recommending this hotel to travelers of all ages and types. .

reviews.title: Aurora we will be back
reviews.text: Firstly incredible staff helpful and friendly. We had a great view of the river and our room was perfect. Nina at reception was really friendly and helpful. Would go back any time.

reviews.title: 3-night  stay  at  Aurora
reviews.text:
We  had  a  huge  room  on  the  top  floor  of  the  new  wing  (no  lift! ).  Had  all  the  facilities  we  needed  plus  very  comfortable  bed.  We  loved  the  view  over the  rice  fields  and  local  village  area.

The  staff  were  always  wanting   to  please,  especially  the  restaurant  staff  +  Hugh  who  was  around  everywhere,  always  with  a  big  smile,  and  eager  to  help  with  everything.

Buffet  breakfast  included  enough  dishes but  was  the  same  every  day.  We  certainly  enjoyed  the  baguettes,  which we  could  warm  in  the  little  oven.

We  found  it  very  useful  to  go  on  the  shuttle  bus  to  town,  as  it  was  quite  difficult  to  walk  along  the  road.

W

reviews.title: Staff are friendly and clean hotel
reviews.text: Location a bit far from the old town, but there is free shuttle bus provided by the hotel. Can ride a bike to the beach or the old town, simply request from the hotel. Nice service, good scenery, hotel is very clean. Thanks Hugh and hotel staffs for your warm and friendly service during our stay.
reviews.positives: Clean, good service

reviews.title: Aurora Riverside Hotel, Hoi An
reviews.text: Enjoyable. The staffs make effort to take to guests. Breakfast was delicious with lots of choices. There was not much nearby but hotel provide free shuttle into Old Hanoi and bicycles. The management said there will be renovation next year, hopefully they will put in double glazing windows, that would make it a super hotel!
reviews.positives: Staffs, breakfast, shuttle bus

reviews.title: nice hotel, great service! nice town
reviews.text:
We had a really good time at this hotel, service was amazing and the room was nice. We had a room with riverside view which was really beautiful. The free bike service was simple and a great transportation method to go to the beach and central hoi an. When we were at the hotel there were some constructions behind the hotel, although we did not have any it did not bother us at all, as a compensation al guest goth some free fresh fruits and a free beer (450ml)

If you visit hoi an we would like to recommend to go to aurora riverside hotel:)
reviews.positives: the service of this hotel was really good. After traveling we felt right at home at arrivel. Location was nice, bike rent was simple and good. rooms where nice and clean.
